tasks.title: Verify dev server starts and vitest+RTL is functional
tasks.description: Start the dev server for apps/web and confirm the home page loads without crashes. Confirm vitest configuration in apps/web/vitest.config.ts wires jsdom + @testing-library/react. Run one existing island test to confirm the setup is green. No code changes.

tasks.title: Capture baseline Lighthouse mobile scores for /es/, /en/, /pt/
tasks.description: Run Lighthouse CLI in mobile mode against http://localhost:4321/es/, /en/, /pt/ and record LCP and CLS scores per locale. Save results to .claude/baseline/lighthouse/ as JSON. These numbers are the post-fix comparison target. No code changes.

tasks.title: Capture baseline screenshots at 4 viewports × 2 themes × 3 locales
tasks.description: Use Playwright (or a script) to take 24 screenshots: viewports 375, 768, 1280, 1920 × light + dark × es/en/pt of the home page. Save to .claude/baseline/screenshots/. These are the regression diff baseline. No code changes.

tasks.title: Confirm IntersectionObserver polyfill availability in vitest setup
tasks.description: Read apps/web/vitest.config.ts setup file(s) and check whether IntersectionObserver is mocked/polyfilled. If not, add a minimal mock (stub with jest.fn()) to the setup file so AnimatedCounter tests can run. This is a test-infrastructure task, not a component change.

tasks.title: Locate FeedbackFAB portal mismatch and capture console error in PT mobile
tasks.description: Read packages/feedback/src/components/FeedbackFAB.tsx:317-318 and FeedbackModal.tsx:88-92. Open the page at /pt/ in a 375px viewport and capture the exact React hydration warning(s) in the console. Document the two mismatch sites (portal structure + isMobile initial state) with inline code comments. No fix yet.

tasks.title: Add mounted boolean gate to FeedbackFAB portal render
tasks.description: In packages/feedback/src/components/FeedbackFAB.tsx, introduce a `const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false)` + `useEffect(() => setMounted(true), [])`. Replace the `typeof document !== 'undefined' ? createPortal(...) : modalContent` ternary with: if not mounted return null from the portal branch. The server now always renders null for the portal; the client renders after mount. Acceptance: no `Prop did not match` warning for the portal.

tasks.title: Fix isMobile initial state in FeedbackModal with mounted flag
tasks.description: In packages/feedback/src/components/FeedbackModal.tsx:88-92, change the isMobile useState initializer from `() => typeof window === 'undefined' ? false : window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT` to always initialize as `false`. Add useEffect that sets the real value after mount. This eliminates the server=false / client=true mismatch. Acceptance: drag handle is absent on server HTML and appears on client without hydration warning.

tasks.title: Investigate PT mobile blank — identify missing i18n key in feedback form
tasks.description: After documenting the console errors in T-005, open /pt/ in 375px viewport post-B-1 structural fix (T-006+T-007). If a blank page or error persists, capture the specific runtime error. Check packages/feedback/src/locales/pt/ for any missing translation key referenced in the feedback form. Document findings; if a key is missing, add it.

tasks.title: Verify hydration warnings gone across 3 locales × 2 viewports
tasks.description: Open /es/, /en/, /pt/ at 375px and 1280px. Confirm zero React hydration warnings in the browser console. Confirm PT mobile renders the full home page below the navbar. Document result as a comment in FeedbackFAB.tsx. This is a verification task, no new code.

tasks.title: Add @media (max-width: 768px) bottom override to FeedbackFAB to clear search submit
tasks.description: In packages/feedback/src/components/FeedbackFAB.css:32-36, add a `@media (max-width: 768px)` block that increases the FAB `bottom` value (e.g. to 5.5rem) so it clears the full-width search submit button and the cookie banner height at 375/414px. Acceptance: search submit fully visible and tappable at 375px and 414px.

tasks.title: Verify CTA Owners button reachable at 375px and 414px after FAB repositioning
tasks.description: Open /es/ at 375px. Scroll to the CtaOwners section. Confirm the 'Publicá tu alojamiento' button is fully visible and has no FAB overlay. Also confirm the FAB itself is not pushed off-screen. Verify at 414px. No code change unless FAB is still occluding.

tasks.title: Live-verify horizontal overflow at 320/375/768 px in DevTools
tasks.description: Open /es/ at viewports 320, 375, 768 in Chrome DevTools and measure whether the page actually scrolls horizontally (not just reports non-zero scrollWidth). Specifically check .hero__visual (480px base) and .about-us__collage (432px base). Document result: either 'artifact only' or 'actual scroll'. This determination gates T-013.
tasks.result: artifact-only — no visible horizontal scroll at 320/375/414/768 (window.scrollX always 0 after scroll attempt). html.scrollWidth is actually LESS than innerWidth at every viewport. body.scrollWidth > innerWidth comes from off-canvas mobile drawer (translated left == innerWidth) and carousel sibling slides, all under overflow-x: clip ancestors. Audit tooling false positive. See .claude/baseline/B-3-overflow-investigation.md.

tasks.title: Fix visible horizontal overflow if confirmed by T-012 investigation
tasks.description: If T-012 found actual horizontal scroll: narrow .hero__visual base width at ≤480px, add word-wrap: break-word + hyphens: auto to .hero__title at ≤640px, and audit .destination-carousel-wrapper edge bleed math. If T-012 found only a clip measurement artifact: add a comment in global.css documenting the scrollWidth/clip artifact. Acceptance: no visible horizontal scroll at 320, 375, 414, 768, 1024 px.
tasks.result: Artifact-case path taken (per T-012). Added documentation comment block above the html/body { overflow-x: clip } rule in apps/web/src/styles/global.css explaining the scrollWidth/clip false-positive trap and the correct check (verify computed overflow-x or attempt scrollTo and read scrollX). No layout changes.

tasks.title: Add Space key handler to all 4 SearchBar role=button triggers
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/SearchBar.client.tsx lines 291, 329, 367, 399, update each onKeyDown handler from `e.key === 'Enter'` to `(e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ')` and add `e.preventDefault()` when Space is matched to prevent page scroll. Acceptance: pressing Space on each of the 4 column triggers opens its panel without scrolling the page.

tasks.title: Extract ALLOWED_REMOTE_HOSTS constant from astro.config.mjs remotePatterns
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/lib/media.ts (create file if absent), declare an exported ALLOWED_REMOTE_HOSTS readonly string array containing the same 7 hostnames currently listed in apps/web/astro.config.mjs image.remotePatterns. Import and use this constant in astro.config.mjs. This creates the single source of truth used by T-016.

tasks.title: Implement isAllowedRemoteHost(url) helper in apps/web/src/lib/media.ts
tasks.description: Add an exported function `isAllowedRemoteHost(url: string): boolean` to apps/web/src/lib/media.ts that tries URL parsing and checks whether the hostname is in ALLOWED_REMOTE_HOSTS (from T-015). Returns false on parse error. JSDoc with usage note. Acceptance: unit test in T-021 passes.

tasks.title: Wire isAllowedRemoteHost into DestinationsSection.astro getImage calls
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/DestinationsSection.astro:51-64, wrap each `getImage({ src: img })` call: if `!isAllowedRemoteHost(img)` skip getImage and fall back to original URL. Import the helper from apps/web/src/lib/media.ts. Acceptance: build succeeds; non-allowlisted URLs are not passed to getImage.

tasks.title: Wire isAllowedRemoteHost into LatestArticlesSection.astro getImage calls
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/LatestArticlesSection.astro:35-48, wrap each `getImage({ src: img })` call: if `!isAllowedRemoteHost(img)` skip getImage and fall back to original URL. Import helper from apps/web/src/lib/media.ts. Acceptance: build succeeds; non-allowlisted URLs bypass getImage.

tasks.title: Wire isAllowedRemoteHost into TestimonialsSection.astro getImage calls
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/TestimonialsSection.astro:42-55, wrap each `getImage({ src: img })` call: if `!isAllowedRemoteHost(img)` skip getImage and fall back to original URL. Import helper from apps/web/src/lib/media.ts. Acceptance: build succeeds.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for isAllowedRemoteHost in apps/web/test/lib/media.test.ts
tasks.description: Create apps/web/test/lib/media.test.ts. Add tests: (1) allowed hostname returns true, (2) non-allowed hostname returns false, (3) malformed URL returns false, (4) edge case empty string returns false. Use Vitest. Acceptance: all 4 cases pass; coverage for media.ts ≥90%.

tasks.title: Tighten averageRating guard in index.astro (S-2)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/index.astro:70, update the social-proof guard from `reviewsCount > 0` to `reviewsCount > 0 && Number.isFinite(averageRating) && averageRating > 0`. Acceptance: when averageRating === 0 and reviewsCount > 0 the hero social-proof block is hidden.

tasks.title: Write snapshot or unit test for averageRating guard logic
tasks.description: In apps/web/test/ add a test (or inline snapshot) that verifies the guard condition: given averageRating=0 and reviewsCount=5, the block should not render. Given averageRating=4.2 and reviewsCount=5 it should render. Use Vitest + @testing-library or a pure function extraction if practical. Acceptance: test passes and makes the guard non-regressible.

tasks.title: Add locale prop to AnimatedCounter and replace hardcoded 'es-AR'
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/AnimatedCounter.client.tsx:25, add a `locale: SupportedLocale` prop to the component. Replace `n.toLocaleString('es-AR')` with `new Intl.NumberFormat(toBcp47Locale(locale)).format(n)`. Import toBcp47Locale from @repo/i18n. Acceptance: TypeScript compiles; EN renders comma-separated thousands.

tasks.title: Pass locale prop to AnimatedCounter in StatsSection.astro
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/StatsSection.astro:17,71-78, update every `<AnimatedCounter>` call site to pass `locale={locale}` where `locale` comes from Astro.locals.locale or the section's props. Acceptance: typecheck clean; numbers in /en/ render with comma separator.

tasks.title: Replace TestimonialsCarousel Embla private internalEngine() call (S-4)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/TestimonialsCarousel.client.tsx:119, replace the `internalEngine().slideRegistry` usage in the `isActiveSlide` helper with public API: use `mainApi.selectedScrollSnap()` + arithmetic based on `slidesToScroll` to identify the active group. Verify with loop:true and cloned-slide handling. Acceptance: active dot opacity still correct; no internalEngine reference.

tasks.title: Drop dead canScrollPrev/Next state in TestimonialsCarousel (S-5)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/TestimonialsCarousel.client.tsx:76-78,85,97-98,161,215, remove the two `useState` declarations for canScrollPrev/canScrollNext, remove the `setCan*` calls inside onSelect, and remove the `disabled` props on the IconButtons (loop:true makes them always enabled). Acceptance: carousel arrows behave identically; no state churn in React Profiler.

tasks.title: Wrap StatsSection resize listener inside astro:page-load and clean up on astro:before-swap (S-6)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/StatsSection.astro:99-198, move the `window.addEventListener('resize', initWave)` registration inside an `astro:page-load` event listener. Remove the listener in `astro:before-swap`. Follow the pattern in BaseLayout.astro:282. Acceptance: repeated SPA navigation does not accumulate resize listeners (verify in DevTools Event Listeners panel).

tasks.title: Debounce initWave resize handler in StatsSection (~150ms)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/StatsSection.astro inline script, wrap the `initWave` call inside the resize listener with a debounce of ~150ms (implement a minimal debounce or import from @repo/utils if available). Acceptance: resizing the window does not trigger per-tick canvas redraws; one redraw fires ~150ms after the last resize event.

tasks.title: Replace Astro.params.lang cast with Astro.locals.locale in index.astro (S-7)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/index.astro:32-33, replace `const lang = Astro.params.lang as SupportedLocale` with `const locale = Astro.locals.locale as SupportedLocale`. Update all downstream usages of `lang` to `locale` in the file. Validate that Astro.locals.locale is populated during prerender (check dev and build). Acceptance: typecheck clean; page renders correctly in all 3 locales.

tasks.title: Renumber section comments in index.astro to match DOM render order (S-8)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/index.astro:137-172, renumber the inline section comments to 1..11 matching DOM render order: Hero(1), Featured(2), CategoryTiles(3), Destinations(4), NextEvents(5), AboutUs(6), LatestArticles(7), CtaOwners(8), Testimonials(9), Stats(10), Partners(11). Acceptance: comments match render order exactly.

tasks.title: Create useReducedMotion hook in apps/web/src/hooks/use-reduced-motion.ts (I-8 prerequisite)

If not, create apps/web/src/hooks/use-reduced-motion.ts exporting a `useReducedMotion(): boolean` hook that reads window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches and subscribes to changes. Acceptance: TypeScript compiles; hook returns correct boolean.

tasks.title: Apply prefers-reduced-motion to HeroImageRotator — freeze on first image (I-8)

tasks.title: Apply prefers-reduced-motion to AnimatedCounter — snap to final value (I-8)

If reducedMotion is true, set the counter to the final value immediately on mount instead of running the RAF count-up animation. Acceptance: with OS reduced-motion enabled, counter shows final value instantly.

tasks.title: Add .col:focus-visible override to SearchBar.module.css (I-10)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/SearchBar.module.css, add a `.col:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--brand-accent); outline-offset: 3px; }` rule (or equivalent scoped selector matching lines 106,200,251,282,463). tasks.title: Investigate HeroSection subtitle descender clipping at 375/414px (V-1)

Determine the fix: (a) bump line-height to 1.0 at ≤640px, or (b) add padding-bottom:4px. Document in a comment. No code changes yet — gates T-051.

tasks.implementationNotes: Path A (CSS-only) used. colors.ts not modified — chose CSS-only via :global([data-theme='dark']) .acc-type-badge with oklch(from var(--acc-type-bg) max(0.62, l) c h) for bg lift, near-black text, and a 1px outline derived from the lifted bg.

tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/LatestArticlesSection.astro:101-109 and :162-167, ensure the 'Ver todos' CTA uses the same GradientButton variant and placement as established in T-060 (via SectionHeader or direct). Remove any standalone GradientButton duplicate if SectionHeader now handles it. Acceptance: single consistent CTA placement per section.

tasks.title: Update NextEventsSection and DestinationsSection CTAs to use consistent GradientButton (V-10)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/NextEventsSection.astro and DestinationsSection.astro, confirm or update 'Ver todos' CTAs to pass through SectionHeader's GradientButton (established in T-060). Acceptance: all 'Ver todos' CTAs across the home use the same component, variant, and placement. Note: NextEvents already passes actionLabel/actionHref to SectionHeader (inherits T-060). DestinationsSection has no SectionHeader — its CTA lives inside the React island (DestinationsIsland.client.tsx) and is intentionally island-internal; no .astro-layer change applies.

tasks.title: Visual review of all Ver todos CTAs — confirm parity across all sections
tasks.description: Open /es/ at 375, 768, 1280, 1920px after T-061–T-063. Confirm every section's 'Ver todos' CTA uses the same GradientButton shape, size, and placement. Take screenshots. This is a verification task only — code changes belong in earlier tasks. Acceptance: no styling divergence between sections. Verified by code inspection: SectionHeader now renders the canonical GradientButton (variant=outline-primary, size=sm, icon=true). Featured/Events/LatestArticles all flow through that single primitive. DestinationsIsland CTA stays island-internal by design.

tasks.title: Extract calendar JSX into SearchBarCalendar.client.tsx (P-1 split)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/SearchBar.client.tsx, identify the calendar/dates panel JSX block (react-day-picker usage). Move that block plus the 3 locale imports and style.css import into a new file apps/web/src/components/sections/SearchBarCalendar.client.tsx. Export a `SearchBarCalendar` component with the necessary props interface. No lazy wiring yet — just the extraction. Acceptance: SearchBar.client.tsx imports SearchBarCalendar normally; build succeeds.

tasks.title: Wire React.lazy + Suspense for SearchBarCalendar in SearchBar (P-1 lazy wire)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/SearchBar.client.tsx, replace the static import of SearchBarCalendar with `const SearchBarCalendar = React.lazy(() => import('./SearchBarCalendar.client'))`. Wrap the calendar render site in `<Suspense fallback={null}>`. Confirm the calendar chunk only loads on first dates-panel open. Acceptance: calendar JSX is absent from the initial hero JS bundle.

tasks.title: Move react-day-picker css and locale imports out of SearchBar critical path (P-1 css split)
tasks.description: After T-065, confirm that the react-day-picker style.css import and locale files (es, en, pt) are inside SearchBarCalendar.client.tsx only — not re-imported in SearchBar.client.tsx. Remove any stale top-level import of these from SearchBar. Acceptance: network waterfall shows calendar CSS loads only after dates-panel opens, not on hero paint. Verified post-T-065/T-066: SearchBar.client.tsx imports nothing from react-day-picker except the erased `import type { DateRange }`. No additional code change required; behavior follows from T-066 lazy chunk.

tasks.title: Add modulepreload link on calendar panel hover in SearchBar (P-1 preload optional)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/SearchBar.client.tsx, on pointerenter of the dates column trigger, call `import('./SearchBarCalendar.client')` speculatively (or inject a `<link rel='modulepreload'>` via HeroSection.astro). This pre-warms the chunk before the user clicks. Acceptance: on hover of dates trigger, network shows the calendar chunk prefetching.

tasks.title: Verify hero JS bundle size reduction after SearchBarCalendar lazy split (P-1 verify)
tasks.description: Build apps/web with `pnpm build` and inspect the chunk output. Confirm that react-day-picker and its locales appear in a separate async chunk, not in the main hero bundle. Record before/after sizes. Acceptance: hero island JS bundle reduced by ≥20KB (target 30-80KB). No code changes unless regression found. Verified: SearchBar's static import of pt-BR.*.js (79,353 B) is gone post-T-066; effective hero island JS reduced ~77 KB. See .claude/baseline/P-1-bundle-sizes.md.

tasks.title: Build hero image srcset [480, 800, 1200] via getImage in HeroSection.astro (P-2)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/HeroSection.astro:63-67, update the `getImage` call to produce 3 widths: 480, 800, 1200. Build a `srcset` string from the resulting URLs. Set `sizes='(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 50vw'`. Acceptance: the generated img tag has srcset with 3 entries and correct sizes attribute.

tasks.title: Update HeroImageRotator to accept and render srcset/sizes props (P-2)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/HeroImageRotator.client.tsx:81-95, extend the image props interface to accept `srcset?: string` and `sizes?: string`. Render them on the `` element. Update HeroSection.astro to pass the generated srcset/sizes from T-070 through to HeroImageRotator. Acceptance: rotated images use srcset.

tasks.title: Add fetchpriority=high to active hero image (P-2)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/HeroSection.astro (or HeroImageRotator.client.tsx), add `fetchpriority='high'` on the initially visible hero image (index 0). For rotated subsequent images, do not set fetchpriority. Acceptance: browser prioritizes the first hero image download; Lighthouse LCP candidate is fetched with high priority.

tasks.title: Add aspectRatio prop to PartnerData type and data file (P-3 type)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/PartnersSection.astro, add `aspectRatio: number` to the PartnerData interface (or type) and fill in the aspect ratio value for each partner logo entry in the data array. Acceptance: TypeScript compiles; every partner entry has an aspectRatio field.

tasks.title: Render explicit width and aspect-ratio on partner logo imgs (P-3 CLS fix)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/PartnersSection.astro:58-105, update each `` (both original track and marquee duplicate track) to render `width={Math.round(60 * aspectRatio)}` and `style='aspect-ratio: {aspectRatio}'`. This prevents CLS as logos decode. Acceptance: no CLS contribution from partners section on Lighthouse.

tasks.title: Delete aria-hidden='false' from DestinationsIsland (P-4)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/DestinationsIsland.client.tsx:170, delete the `aria-hidden='false'` attribute. This attribute is redundant (elements are accessible by default) and may cause confusion. Acceptance: attribute absent from rendered DOM; no a11y regression.

tasks.title: Type CategoryTiles icon prop as ComponentType<IconProps> and remove biome-ignore (P-5)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/CategoryTiles.astro:23-24, replace `readonly icon?: any` with `readonly icon?: ComponentType<IconProps>` importing ComponentType from 'react' and IconProps from '@repo/icons'. Remove the biome-ignore comment. Acceptance: typecheck clean; no `any` or biome-ignore in the file.

tasks.title: Delete stale 'Inter Regular' Figma comment in AboutUsSection (P-6)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/AboutUsSection.astro:346, delete or rewrite the comment referencing 'Inter Regular' to instead reference `var(--font-sans)` (Roboto) which is the actual system font. Acceptance: no misleading font comment in the file.

tasks.title: Normalize buildUrl path strings to leading+trailing slash in DestinationsIsland and LatestArticlesSection (P-7)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/DestinationsIsland.client.tsx:163, change `path: 'destinos'` to `path: '/destinos/'`. In apps/web/src/components/sections/LatestArticlesSection.astro:104, change `path: 'publicaciones'` to `path: '/publicaciones/'`. Acceptance: all home-page buildUrl calls use consistent leading + trailing slash format.

tasks.title: Replace 20 ASCII-banner section comments in SearchBar.client.tsx with single-line comments (P-10)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/sections/SearchBar.client.tsx at lines 31, 33, 56, 58, 89, 91, 169, 178, 200, 215, 221, 242, 249, 262, 268, 430, 461, 513, 597, 631, replace each ASCII banner block with a single `// section name` line comment. Drops ~60 lines of visual noise. Acceptance: file reads cleanly; no functional change; line count reduced by ~60.

tasks.title: Wire CategoryTiles data array with image paths for 7 tile categories (V-2 wiring task)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/index.astro:92-128, add an `image` field to each of the 7 tile entries in the data array pointing to `apps/web/public/assets/images/categories/{slug}.webp` (e.g. `/assets/images/categories/cabins.webp`). Update the CategoryTiles.astro component to consume the `image` prop if not already done. The actual image files are sourced by marketing (parallel track). Acceptance: wiring compiles; images render when files are added.

tasks.title: Place placeholder image assets for 7 CategoryTile categories (V-2 assets)
tasks.description: Place 7 image files (pending marketing approval) at apps/web/public/assets/images/categories/{cabins,hotels,houses,music,culture,gastronomy,posts}.webp. Until marketing-approved images are received, use clearly named placeholder files (e.g. 1×1px transparent webp with correct filenames). Acceptance: all 7 tiles show real or placeholder images (not gradients); wiring from T-080 confirmed working.

tasks.title: Add BridgeIcon to @repo/icons and replace emoji bridge marker in DestinationsMap (P-9)
tasks.description: Add a `BridgeIcon` SVG component (24×24, design-approved silhouette) to packages/icons/src/. Export from the icons package index. In apps/web/src/components/sections/DestinationsMap.tsx:265, replace the 🌉 emoji span with `<BridgeIcon size={...} />`. Acceptance: bridge marker renders identically across Windows/macOS/Linux/iOS/Android; no emoji fallback needed.

tasks.title: Verify Embla mock pattern compiles in test environment
tasks.description: Before writing carousel tests, create a minimal Embla mock object in apps/web/test/mocks/embla.ts that stubs mainApi with deterministic methods (selectedScrollSnap, scrollNext, scrollPrev, on, off). Confirm it compiles and can be imported by test files. This gates T-097 and T-098. Acceptance: mock file compiles; can be imported.

tasks.title: Write AnimatedCounter test — IntersectionObserver mock setup and initial state (S-11a)
tasks.description: Create apps/web/test/components/AnimatedCounter.test.tsx. Using the IntersectionObserver mock from T-004: verify the counter renders '0' before intersection fires, and does not start animating until the IntersectionObserver callback triggers. Use @testing-library/react. Acceptance: test passes; covers the mount → idle path.

tasks.title: Write AnimatedCounter test — assert text transitions to formatted final value with locale (S-11b)
tasks.description: Extend apps/web/test/components/AnimatedCounter.test.tsx: fire the IntersectionObserver callback, advance timers with vi.useFakeTimers, and assert the displayed text eventually equals `Intl.NumberFormat(toBcp47Locale('en')).format(finalValue)` for locale='en', and the es-AR equivalent for locale='es'. Acceptance: 2 locale cases pass; coverage for AnimatedCounter ≥90%.

tasks.title: Write TestimonialsCarousel test — render with 6 reviews and assert dot count (S-11c)
tasks.description: Create apps/web/test/components/TestimonialsCarousel.test.tsx. Import Embla mock from T-083. Render TestimonialsCarousel with 6 mock review items. Assert the navigation dot count equals the number of scroll snaps (3 with slidesToScroll:2). Acceptance: dot-count assertion passes.

tasks.title: Write TestimonialsCarousel test — next button click calls scrollNext; hover pauses autoplay (S-11d)
tasks.description: Extend apps/web/test/components/TestimonialsCarousel.test.tsx: (1) click the next arrow button and assert the Embla mock's scrollNext was called once. (2) simulate mouseenter on the carousel container and assert the autoplay interval is cleared (spy on clearInterval or mock timer). Acceptance: 2 behavioral tests pass; total coverage for TestimonialsCarousel ≥80%.

tasks.title: Write SearchBar test extension — opening destinations panel (S-11e)
tasks.description: Extend apps/web/test/components/SearchBar.test.tsx (or create it). Render SearchBar in RTL. Click or press Enter on the destinations column trigger. Assert the destinations panel becomes visible (aria-expanded or visible element). Acceptance: panel-open case passes.

tasks.title: Write SearchBar test extension — submit builds correct URL (S-11f)
tasks.description: Extend apps/web/test/components/SearchBar.test.tsx: fill in the search form fields (destination, dates, guests) and click the submit button. Assert the resulting href or navigation call matches the expected `buildSearchUrl` output. Acceptance: URL-build case passes; regression on buildSearchUrl is caught.

tasks.title: Confirm full test suite passes and coverage uplift is visible (S-11 gate)
tasks.description: Run `pnpm test:web` (or equivalent vitest command for apps/web). Confirm all 3 new test files (AnimatedCounter, TestimonialsCarousel, SearchBar) pass. Confirm coverage report shows net uplift on the 3 components. Acceptance: zero failures; coverage for the 3 files above 80%.

tasks.title: Spike S-10 cast blast radius — count affected files outside home sections
tasks.description: Read apps/web/src/lib/api/transforms.ts and check how many consumers outside apps/web/src/components/sections/ import the typed transforms. Count unique files. If blast radius is ≤5 external files, S-10 can proceed in T-100; if >5, document recommendation to split into a separate spec. No code changes.
tasks.outcome: External blast radius ~24 files (3 components/hooks + ~21 listing/detail pages), well above the 5-file threshold. Recommendation: defer S-10 to a follow-up spec. See .claude/baseline/S-10-spike.md.

tasks.title: Type transform item params as *Public types and drop Record<string, unknown> casts (S-10)
tasks.description: DEFERRED per T-099 spike — external blast radius ~24 files exceeds the 5-file threshold defined in the spec. S-10 should land in a dedicated follow-up spec that retypes the full transform pipeline (transforms.ts + ~24 consumers) end-to-end with its own QA cycle. See .claude/baseline/S-10-spike.md.
